instruction:
Add mocking to isolate `parse_body` from its external dependencies.


Existing mocking patterns in this package:
```r
local_mocked_bindings(
    parse_body = function(body, content_type = "unknown", parsers = NULL) {
      print(content_type)
      body
    }
  )
```


Requirements:
1. Identify external dependencies in the function (system calls, file I/O, other packages)
2. Use testthat::local_mocked_bindings() to mock each dependency
3. Test both success and failure scenarios via mock return values
4. Verify the function handles mock errors gracefully
5. Ensure tests are deterministic (no network calls, no file system side effects)
context:
Package: plumber v1.3.3.9000
Description: An API Generator for R
Function: parse_body
Parameters: body, content_type, parsers
Test patterns used: local_mocked_bindings

Function Code:
```r
parse_body <- function(body, content_type = NULL, parsers = NULL) {
  if (!is.raw(body)) {body <- charToRaw(body)}
  toparse <- list(value = body, content_type = content_type, parsers = parsers)
  parse_raw(toparse)
}
```
